gaps: AI training use of wallet data not addressed
Specific private key handling and security procedures unclear
Appeal process for account restrictions not detailed
Cross-chain data correlation practices not explained
label_notes: Source: training knowledge. MetaMask is a self-custodial cryptocurrency wallet extension with minimal data collection compared to centralized exchanges. Does not store private keys on servers. ConsenSys collects primarily usage analytics and account recovery information. No sale of data to third parties. Note: Most transaction data is visible on public blockchain by design. Verify current policies on MFA options and AI use.
